title: Valero Energy Has a Strong Investment Thesis
text: Valero Energy Corp. ( VLO , Financial) is a large petroleum refining group and a member of the S&P 500 Index. The company discloses information to the market in a very transparent manner and, for the most part, is a bet on refining margins.

title: Valero: Renewables And Sustainable Fuel Will Contribute To Upside
text: Valero has invested 40% of their growth capital into low carbon growth projects to capture rising demand. Analysts predict an EPS of $9.27 for 2027. Using this estimate alongside the expected growth rate of 7%, VLO's fair value per share comes out to over $200/share. Valero has a conservative payout ratio of 13% and a 5-year average dividend growth rate of 5.4%.

title: Here's Why Hold Strategy is Apt for Valero (VLO) Stock Now
text: Valero's (VLO) premium refining operations are resilient, even when the business operating environment is carbon-constrained. However, rising operating expenses are hurting VLO's bottom line.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Energy Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023
text: While energy stocks have suffered amid the Federal Reserve's efforts to contain inflation, the segment has witnessed a resurgence. According to a CNN report earlier this month, oil prices have jumped double-digit percentage points, helping to carry the broader sector northward.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Discover Shares Plunge After C-Suite Shakeup
text: U.S. equities slumped, with the S&P 500 tumbling 1.16% on Tuesday, Aug. 15, 2023, amid worries about China's economy and possible Fed rate hikes.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy for Income and Upside
text: Investors buy dividend stocks for a few reasons. For one, they provide income via dividends that act as a bonus on top of capital appreciation over time.

title: 7 Stocks to Buy Now to Beat the Inflation Blues
text: In June, annual inflation (from the most recent data) slipped to 3%, which on paper clashes with the concept of stocks to beat inflation. After all, NPR pointed out that the aforementioned statistic represented the lowest point since March 2021.
